nasb.text: You should diligently keep the commandments of the Lord your God, and His testimonies and His statutes which He has commanded you.

esv.text: You shall diligently keep the commandments of the Lord your God, and his testimonies and his statutes, which he has commanded you.

cnv.text: 要謹慎遵守耶和華你們的　神吩咐你的誡命、法度和律例。

ccb.text: 要谨遵你们的上帝耶和华吩咐你们的诫命、法度和律例。
